ZIP_CD (11) ZIP code of patients pre-hospital residence CHAR 5 The 5-digit ZIP code of the patient's pre-hospital residence.
27 _12 ADMSN_DT (12) Admission Date DATE 8 The date that the patient begins receiving Part A covered Medicare services in an inpatient rehabilitation facility.
28 _13 ASMT_RFRNC_DT (13) Assessment Reference Date DATE 8 The third calendar day of the rehabilitation stay, which represents the last day of the 3-day admission assessment time period. These three calendar days
